organizations.name: UNI Global Union
organizations.description: Global Union Federation representing over 20 million workers in the skills and services sectors. Parent organization of this tool.

organizations.name: UNI Europa
organizations.description: European regional organization of UNI Global Union.

organizations.name: UNI Graphical & Packaging
organizations.description: UNI Global Union sector covering graphical, packaging, printing, paper, and forestry industries.

organizations.name: IndustriALL Global Union
organizations.description: Global Union Federation representing 50 million workers in mining, energy, and manufacturing sectors.

organizations.name: International Transport Workers' Federation
organizations.description: Global Union Federation representing transport workers worldwide.

organizations.name: International Union of Food, Agricultural, Hotel, Restaurant, Catering, Tobacco and Allied Workers' Associations
organizations.description: Global Union Federation representing workers in food, agriculture, and hospitality.

organizations.name: Building and Wood Workers' International
organizations.description: Global Union Federation for building and woodworkers.

organizations.name: Public Services International
organizations.description: Global Union Federation representing public sector workers.

organizations.name: Education International
organizations.description: Global Union Federation representing education workers and their unions.

organizations.name: International Trade Union Confederation
organizations.description: The world's largest trade union confederation, representing 200 million workers in 163 countries.

organizations.name: European Trade Union Confederation
organizations.description: Voice of European workers, representing 45 million members from 93 trade union organisations.

organizations.name: International Labour Organization
organizations.description: United Nations agency for labour standards, social protection, and work opportunities.

organizations.name: Forest Stewardship Council
organizations.description: International certification system for responsible forestry. Includes Core Labour Requirements based on ILO fundamental conventions.

organizations.name: Organisation for Economic Co-operation and Development
organizations.description: Issues Guidelines for Multinational Enterprises. National Contact Points handle complaints about MNE conduct.
